healing_potion.name: Healing Potion
healing_potion.description: A vial of red liquid that magically heals wounds when drunk.

cloak_of_protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak_of_protection.description: A shimmering cloak that subtly deflects harm.

rapier.name: Rapier
rapier.description: A slender, elegant thrusting sword favored by duelists.

dagger.name: Dagger
dagger.description: A short blade, useful for close work.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Supple, lightweight armor made from tanned hide.

chain_mail.name: Chain Mail
chain_mail.description: Interlocked metal rings providing solid protection.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: Burns for 1 hour, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius.

thieves_tools.name: Thieves' Tools
thieves_tools.description: A set of lockpicks and other tools for bypassing locks.

lute.name: Lute
lute.description: A finely crafted stringed instrument favored by bards.

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: A wooden or metal shield that adds +2 to AC.

component_pouch.name: Component Pouch
component_pouch.description: A belt pouch containing material components for spells.

mace.name: Mace
mace.description: A flanged metal weapon favored by clerics.
